title: lastrea norrisii
intro: Lastrea norrisii, also known as the Norris' Lady fern or Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lastrea norrisii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Lady Fern can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
